meta.title: About: Full-Stack Engineer & AI Automation Expert
meta.description: Senior full-stack engineer with 7+ years shipping web products across Node.js, React, Next.js, Vue, and Nuxt - now focused on AI automation, LLM agents, Claude Code plugins, and MCP servers.

header.title: About
header.description: Full-stack developer with 7+ years shipping web products - JavaScript, Node.js, React/Next.js, Vue, and the CI/CD glue around them. Lately I've been pivoting into AI: building local-first coding agents, Claude Code plugins and skills, and MCP servers for real development workflows. Security is a recurring side-interest - I've written about VPS compromises, adversarial ML, and password entropy alongside the backend and frontend deep-dives.

bullets: Continued ownership of freeconvert.com and the broader TransMedia platform following promotion. Primary stack: Node.js and Nuxt.js.
Set up the Jenkins + Docker CI/CD pipeline for ProPDF - a new SaaS tool in the TransMedia suite - and shipped its feature-rich in-browser PDF editor.
Developed TrueRCE, an in-house rich-text editor built as a drop-in replacement for TinyMCE across the platform.
Introduced agentic AI workflows into the team's day-to-day, and built automations that translate and auto-publish localized content end-to-end.
Contributed to the .NET build pipeline and cross-team workflow improvements.
Developed and maintained freeconvert.com - a top-ranked SaaS platform for online file conversion, compression, and transcoding.
Primary stack: Nuxt.js and Node.js. Partnered with the DevOps team on deployment pipelines and server optimization.
Production stack and integrations: WebSocket, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, SSH, GTM, Google Analytics, Amplitude, Sentry, Intercom, Crisp, Jira.
Technical team lead for the sheba.xyz marketplace team (8 engineers).
Shipped an eCommerce PWA in Vue.js, a B2B web tool in Angular, and several SPAs in Nuxt and React.
Built backend APIs in Laravel and Node, plus admin panels in Laravel / Blade / Vue.
Integrated and operated: WebSocket, PM2, Amazon S3, GTM, Google Analytics, Amplitude, Sentry, Intercom, Crisp.

coreStack.items: TypeScript, Node.js, Next.js, React, Vue, Python, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS, Linux, CI/CD, Claude SDK, Model Context Protocol, Ollama, ONNX Runtime.

availability.status: Open to AI-focused roles, full-stack contracts, and consulting.
